description: Self-contained StreamWeave case studies with copied frames and model traces.

cases.note: 短 backward/ASI 样例。RL 答对前序动作；base 和纯文本都选错。
cases.criterion: RL scored `1`; base and streamtext both scored `0` on the same OVO sample.

cases.note: 纯文本失败明显：streamtext 输出了非选项解释；base 直接 cannot answer；RL 选对。
cases.criterion: RL scored `1`; base and streamtext both scored `0` on the same OVO sample.

cases.note: 修补内胎场景。RL 识别到 polish 前先找漏点；base/text 都误判为 apply glue。
cases.criterion: RL scored `1`; base and streamtext both scored `0` on the same OVO sample.

cases.note: 较长 realtime/ACR 样例。RL 答对人在雪堆后喝水；base/text 误判其他动作。
cases.criterion: RL scored `1`; base and streamtext both scored `0` on the same OVO sample.

cases.note: 新增 EPM 样例。RL 和 streamtext 都答对二楼洗手位置；base 输出 cannot answer。
cases.criterion: RL scored `1`; base scored `0`; streamtext also scored `1`, so this is primarily an RL/base contrast case.

cases.note: 新增 hard EPM 样例。正确答案是 nightlamp；RL 误选 vase，base/text 都未能回答。
cases.criterion: All three compared models scored `0`; this is included as a hard failure example rather than an RL-success case.
